name: SharpSpring
h1: Build AI Agents That Work with SharpSpring
metaTitle: Build SharpSpring AI Agents with DocsBot Skill Builder
metaDescription: Create DocsBot AI agents that use SharpSpring to look up contacts, summarize campaign activity, trigger workflows, and support teams with safe actions.
intro: SharpSpring helps businesses manage marketing automation, CRM activity, lead nurturing, and revenue growth workflows. With DocsBot Skill Builder, you can describe the SharpSpring-powered agent you want in plain language, and DocsBot designs, secures, tests, and packages the Skill for you. The result is an AI support or internal team agent that can answer questions and take approved actions in SharpSpring without exposing sensitive credentials or overreaching permissions.
supportUseCases: Let a customer-facing DocsBot agent look up a contact’s latest campaign activity, lifecycle status, or recent form submissions in SharpSpring while answering support questions.
Use the agent to confirm whether a lead completed a signup form, opened a nurture email, or clicked a campaign link before preparing the next support response.
Allow the agent to create or update contact records in SharpSpring when customers share corrected profile details or request follow-up from a sales or success team.
Have the agent summarize a customer’s engagement history in SharpSpring and add that context to a helpdesk handoff or escalation note.
Trigger approved SharpSpring workflows, tags, or follow-up sequences when a customer asks for a demo, pricing conversation, or onboarding help through chat or a support ticket.
internalUseCases: Enable employees to chat with a private DocsBot agent to retrieve SharpSpring contact, opportunity, campaign, and engagement details without manually searching across records.
Let sales, success, or marketing teams ask the agent to summarize lead activity, recent automations, and campaign performance before outreach or account reviews.
Help employees complete SOPs by having the agent create contacts, update statuses, assign tags, or trigger approved SharpSpring workflows from chat, Slack, or Microsoft Teams.
Give internal teams an AI assistant that researches account history across SharpSpring and prepares concise handoff notes for sales, support, or customer success coordination.
Allow marketing and operations teams to ask the agent for structured summaries of nurture progress, CRM updates, and follow-up gaps so they can act faster.
whatYouCanBuild: An AI support agent that checks SharpSpring lead and contact activity during customer conversations.
A private sales assistant that summarizes campaign engagement before reps contact prospects.
An internal operations agent that updates tags, statuses, and follow-up workflows in SharpSpring.
A helpdesk assistant that prepares escalation notes using SharpSpring contact and activity history.
A marketing team agent that answers questions about nurture progress and recent engagement signals.
An AI handoff workflow that creates SharpSpring tasks after qualified customer support conversations.

howItWorks.title: Describe the outcome
howItWorks.description: You tell Skill Builder what you want the SharpSpring agent to do in plain language, such as looking up lead activity, updating records, or triggering a follow-up workflow during support or internal conversations.

howItWorks.title: Skill Builder designs it
howItWorks.description: Skill Builder turns that goal into a reusable DocsBot Skill, choosing the safest workflow design, defining the needed configuration values, and setting up secure authentication handling without asking you to manually wire the integration.

howItWorks.title: Security is built in
howItWorks.description: Skill Builder protects and proxies secrets through secure runtime configuration, keeps credentials out of chats and Skill source, scopes access to the minimum SharpSpring actions and records required, and adds approval boundaries for sensitive updates or triggers.

howItWorks.title: It tests real scenarios
howItWorks.description: DocsBot’s automated testing agent runs imagined customer support and internal team scenarios against the Skill, finds bugs, weak instructions, missing permission checks, or workflow gaps, and feeds those findings into an automated improvement loop.

howItWorks.title: Publish to the right agent
howItWorks.description: Once the Skill is refined, Skill Builder helps deploy it to your customer-facing DocsBot widget, helpdesk agent, or private team assistant so people can ask questions, get answers, and complete approved SharpSpring actions in one conversation.

faq.question: How can I build an AI agent that works with SharpSpring?
faq.answer: With DocsBot Skill Builder, you describe the SharpSpring workflow you want in plain language, and DocsBot creates the Skill that lets your AI agent safely look up data, update records, trigger workflows, and summarize results. Skill Builder also handles secure configuration, testing, and deployment to the right support or internal agent.

faq.question: Can an AI support agent use SharpSpring data during customer chats or ticket replies?
faq.answer: Yes, a DocsBot support agent can use a SharpSpring Skill to retrieve contact details, engagement history, form submissions, lifecycle status, or campaign activity while responding to customers. You can also define safe actions such as creating follow-up tasks, updating records, or preparing escalations with approval limits where needed.

faq.question: What SharpSpring workflows can an internal AI assistant automate for employees?
faq.answer: An internal DocsBot agent can help employees research contact and campaign history, update CRM fields, apply tags, trigger follow-up automations, and prepare summaries for sales, success, or marketing workflows. This is useful in chat, Slack, or Microsoft Teams when teams need faster answers and bounded actions across routine SOPs.

faq.question: Can DocsBot create SharpSpring handoffs and escalation notes automatically?
faq.answer: Yes, DocsBot can build a Skill that gathers relevant SharpSpring activity, summarizes the customer or lead context, and generates a clean handoff note for support, sales, or customer success teams. You can also add rules for what the agent is allowed to include or which actions require approval.

faq.question: How does DocsBot keep SharpSpring access secure for AI agents?
faq.answer: Skill Builder is designed to define secure configuration values, protect and proxy secrets, and keep authentication details out of chat transcripts and generated content. It also scopes the Skill to the minimum records, users, and SharpSpring actions required and can add approval boundaries for sensitive changes.

faq.question: Can a DocsBot agent update SharpSpring records without giving it unlimited access?
faq.answer: Yes, the Skill can be designed for tightly bounded actions such as updating specific fields, creating approved follow-up tasks, or triggering only certain workflows. Skill Builder helps define those limits up front so the agent acts only within the permissions and approval rules you choose.

brand.title: SharpSpring
brand.description: SharpSpring is a marketing automation provider that offers a full-featured and powerful platform at an affordable price. They help businesses drive relevant leads, convert them into sales, and optimize their marketing spend through comprehensive reports and behavioral-based communication. SharpSpring's all-in-one Revenue Growth Platform includes sales, marketing automation, and CRM features, making it an ideal solution for businesses and marketing agencies looking to fuel their growth.
brand.slogan: Powerful, affordable marketing automation for agencies and growing businesses.
